label: Trade tag generator
description: Generates items that carry a specific trade tag. Picks a random selection of matching ThingDefs up to thingDefCountRange.

tradeTag.label: Trade tag
tradeTag.description: Trade tag string. ThingDefs whose tradeTags list contains this value are eligible for generation.

thingDefCountRange.label: Thing def count range
thingDefCountRange.description: How many distinct ThingDefs to pick per generation pass. Source default IntRange.One.

excludedThingDefs.label: Excluded thing defs
excludedThingDefs.description: ThingDefs explicitly excluded from generation even if they carry the matching trade tag.
